arts.ttl: James Maddison and Radu Dragusin drop Tottenham team news hints for Newcastle amid illness worry
arts.sum: When discussing team news, Postecoglou said : "We had a bit of an illness bug running through the squad as well, so a few missing training, but that's alright, we'll be okay." With the Spurs manager still tight-lipped on the players impacted most by the illness, it's unclear exactly how many will miss out. Postecoglou later confirmed the latter of those names was absent from the start against Wolves last weekend for this exact reason.

arts.ttl: ‘Disappointed’: Troy Deeney says £22m Tottenham player has actually been bang average this season
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s season isn’t going to plan, that’s for sure. Indeed, Spurs sit eleventh in the Premier League table, and even the most pessimistic of...

arts.ttl: 'Don't recognise': Ange Postecoglou says there's one thing 'people keep forgetting' about Tottenham
Exclusive: Tottenham join Man City in race for €20m Ligue 1 star as Postecoglou looks to fix key area
arts.sum: The backline of Tottenham has been ravaged by injuries during the first half of the 2024/25 campaign and Ange Postecoglou will look to fix this issue in January with the potential signing of Lens centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov. The Australian coach has been without his starting central defenders, Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven, over […] The post Exclusive: Tottenham join Man City in race for €20m Ligue 1 star as Postecoglou looks to fix key area appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United complete deal for winger in January breakthrough as rivals beaten to transfer
arts.sum: Already capped by the Republic of Ireland at youth level, Fitzgerald is believed to be highly-rated by the Magpies and deemed a player they see with a genuine pathway to the first-team. Academy chief Steve Harper does not want to simply stockpile players at the Academy and wants more to follow in the footsteps of Elliot Anderson, Sean Longstaff and Andy Carroll who worked their way up to the first-team from the youth system.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's important pledge to Newcastle United diehards as sickness-hit Spurs miss key men
arts.sum: Newcastle United chief Eddie Howe goes in against a Tottenham Hotspur team that has served goal-packed games in their last three home fixtures. Howe has spoken about entertaining the Newcastle fans brought up on Kevin Keegan and Sir Bobby Robson's forward thinking approach, but after going 2-0 up at Old Trafford, the United head coach smartly played a more cautious game to ensure a much-needed victory in the North-West.

arts.ttl: Fikayo Tomori 'done deal', two bargain options - Tottenham January transfer priority revealed - Alasdair Gold - football.london
arts.sum: Spurs just need a body through the door right now, whether that's someone with Premier League experience like Fikayo Tomori or another versatile type like Ko Itakura, they simply need someone to come in and help out for the next month or so. Postecoglou's defence is in a bad way right now with Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Ben Davies not back until later this month and Destiny Udogie out for at least six weeks.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Tottenham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle travel to Tottenham in the Premier League this weekend looking to maintain their hot streak of form. Eddie Howe’s team have won four consecutive Premier League games over the festive period, without conceding a goal, to move into top-four contention. arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Newcastle United in the Premier League this weekend. Ange Postecoglou is under pressure with Spurs’ season slipping away from them. The North Londoners have won just three of their last 13 games and sit closer to the relegation places than top four.
